summary: Russian operators from the 5th Zaharchenko Brigade used the "Yolka" interceptor drone to neutralize Ukrainian Armed Forces drones, showcasing its 230 km/h speed and 3 km interception range. The "Rubikon" Center reported 100 targets destroyed on March 30, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, with joint operations targeting UAV control stations. Ukrainian forces in the Kostiantynivka direction, 36th Marine Brigade, survived a Russian FPV drone attack after detecting the threat with a drone detector. Russian Ka-52 helicopter crew was eliminated near Nadiivka after a crash landing, with additional drones striking during evacuation. Russian forces in Kherson region destroyed a Ukrainian strike fixed-wing drone using the "Yolka" interceptor, which operator "Rostov" described as simple to use with intelligent target tracking and thermal activation.
